ingredients_text: 40.6% Béchamel Sauce (Water, Wheat Flour, Butter (Milk), Lactose (Milk), Milk Protein, Cream (Milk), Salt, Spices, Spice Extracts), 37.5% Croissant (Flour Mix (Wheat, Bean, Malted Wheat), Water, Butter (Milk), Sugar, Yeast, Salt, Antioxidant: Ascorbic Acid), 12.5% Reformed Ham with Added Water (Pork, Water, Salt, Glucose Syrup, Stabilisers: Triphosphates, Diphosphates; Dextrose, Flavourings, Gelling Agent: Carrageenan; Antioxidant: Sodium Erythorbate; Preservative: Sodium Nitrite), 9.4% Emmental Cheese (Milk)
